---
title: "Figure 5 (Gaussian/numeric Fisher ratio contour) — all algorithms, sim and pool"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Filled contour of the DIAGONAL ratio (analytic) Gaussian Fisher / numeric Fisher, per parameter,
over the design plane (x = interval, y = N_ch), faceted parameter x noise, one PDF per
algorithm x source. If the Gaussian FIM formula matches the numerical curvature the ratio is 1
(white). It turns out to be ~1 for ALL algorithms (log10 ratio within about +/-0.2), so this uses
a FINE symmetric log scale (+/-0.45), same 23-colour extended palette as the info-distortion maps,
white centred on 0 (= ratio 1). Gaussian Fisher = Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information
(mean), numeric = Likelihood_Numerical_Fisher_Information (value); both from *_battery_{sim,pool}.csv.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGOS    <- c("macro_NR", "macro_NMR", "macro_R", "macro_MR", "macro_IR")
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_NR = "NR", macro_NMR = "MNR", macro_R = "R", macro_MR = "MR", macro_IR = "IR")
SOURCES  <- c(battery_sim = "sim", battery_pool = "pool")

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
GAUSS <- "Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information"
NUMER <- "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Numerical_Fisher_Information"

# FINE symmetric log10-ratio bands, white (-0.005, 0.005] contains 0 (= ratio 1). 23 bands.
POS         <- c(0.005, 0.01, 0.02, 0.035, 0.05, 0.08, 0.12, 0.18, 0.28, 0.45)
FILL_BREAKS <- c(-Inf, -rev(POS), POS, Inf)
PAL <- colorRampPalette(c("#021024", "#053061", "#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", "#D1E5F0",
                          "#F7F7F7",
                          "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B", "#67001F", "#3d0011")
                        )(length(FILL_BREAKS) - 1)
```

```{r fns}
read_algo <- function(algo, kind) {
  files <- unlist(lapply(NOISES, function(z) Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_%s.csv", NSIM, algo, z, kind)))))
  noises <- sub(".*_noise_([0-9.]+)_.*", "\\1", basename(files))
  map2_dfr(files, noises, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = .y))
}

diag_of <- function(df, comp, stat, nm) df %>%
  filter(component_path == comp, statistic == stat, probit == "mean",
         param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]) %>%
  group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name) %>%
  summarise(!!nm := mean(value), .groups = "drop")

ratio_diag <- function(df) {
  inner_join(diag_of(df, GAUSS, "mean",  "G"),
             diag_of(df, NUMER, "value", "N"),
             by = c("noise", "Num_ch", "interval_in_tau", "param_name")) %>%
    filter(is.finite(G), is.finite(N), N > 0, G > 0) %>%
    mutate(logD = log10(G / N),
           lx = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
           param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
           noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
}

X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

build_one <- function(algo, kind, suffix) {
  dd  <- ratio_diag(read_algo(algo, kind))
  lab <- ALGO_LAB[[algo]]
  g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = logD)) +
    geom_contour_filled(breaks = FILL_BREAKS) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE,
                      name = expression(log[10]~frac(F[gauss], F[num]))) +
    geom_point(size = .3, colour = "grey30") +
    facet_grid(param ~ noisef, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
    labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]),
         title = sprintf("%s  Gaussian / numeric Fisher (diagonal), log10 ratio  [%s]", lab, suffix)) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 6), legend.key.size = unit(.32, "cm"),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  ggsave(sprintf("Figure_5_fisher_ratio_contour_filled_%s_%s.pdf", lab, suffix), g,
         width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
  g
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
for (a in ALGOS) for (k in names(SOURCES)) print(build_one(a, k, SOURCES[[k]]))
```
